posts.author: Ashton (Ashton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m a new user to here and the product. Also English is my second language, so I might not be able to describe the problem well. Hopefully someone understands my explanation.

So… here the problem.

I have a few workers in my company who are contact workers for 3 months.
I already put the starting date in my column, but I do not know how to formulate the end date of the contract.

Please help me the formula for this!

Thanks!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Ashton

Welcome to the community. You can do one of those two things:

  • create a new date column and call in End Date
  • create a new timeline column (which has a start and an end date)
